bhagat-singh.origin: Roared in court as he was sentenced

rani-lakshmibai.meaning: I will not give up my Jhansi!
rani-lakshmibai.origin: Said before the battle of Jhansi, 1858

subhas-bose.cry: Give me blood, I will give you freedom!
subhas-bose.origin: Spoken to the Indian National Army

mahatma-gandhi.meaning: We will succeed or give our lives!

tilak.meaning: Self-rule is my right by birth!

chandrashekhar-azad.cry: Dushman ki goliyon ka hum saamna karenge!
chandrashekhar-azad.meaning: We will face the enemy's bullets!

lala-lajpat-rai.cry: They may crush my body but not my spirit!
lala-lajpat-rai.meaning: My will is stronger than any blow!
lala-lajpat-rai.origin: Spoken after the lathi charge of 1928

birsa-munda.cry: Abua raj ete jana, maharani raj tundu jana!
birsa-munda.meaning: Let OUR rule begin, let the Queen's rule end!

rani-gaidinliu.meaning: We will never surrender our culture!
rani-gaidinliu.origin: Rallying cry of the Naga movement

kunwar-singh.origin: Ancient war cry of brave warriors

ram-prasad-bismil.cry: Sarfaroshi ki tamanna ab hamare dil mein hai!
ram-prasad-bismil.meaning: The desire to give our life burns in our heart!

kittur-chennamma.meaning: Defend the land that gave you life!

kattabomman.meaning: I will never bow to invaders!

matangini-hazra.meaning: I bow to thee, Mother India!
matangini-hazra.origin: Her last words while holding the tricolor

sarojini-naidu.meaning: I bow to thee, Mother India!
sarojini-naidu.origin: The freedom struggle's most loved chant
